title: Boot/Kernel Configuration Modified
expression: (event.type == 'change' && file.type == 'file') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/sysctl.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modules-load.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modprobe.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/default/grub') || contains(file.path || '', 'lib/modules/')
